landing.subheadline: Identify plants, detect diseases, get crop and fertilizer recommendations — all in English, Hindi, and Marathi. Built for Indian farmers.
landing.features_subtitle: From soil to harvest — CropGuard AI covers every step of your farming journey.

features.plant_id_desc: Upload a photo and instantly identify any plant or tree using AI.
features.disease_desc: Detect crop diseases early and get actionable treatment plans.
features.crop_desc: Get crop suggestions based on your soil nutrients and climate.
features.irrigation_desc: Know exactly how much water your crops need and when.
features.weather_desc: Real-time weather data with farming-specific recommendations.
features.chatbot_desc: Ask farming questions in English, Hindi, or Marathi.

source_badge.local_model_warning: This result was generated by the offline fallback model. Accuracy may be limited for crops outside the PlantVillage dataset.
